---
adapter: discord
channel_id: "chan_memes"
channel_name: "memes"
guild_id: "guild_test"
guild_name: "Test Server"
type: moves
---
# Moves (summaries of message ranges)

[^] msg1000-msg1006 Drake documentation meme: "writing documentation" vs "writing code that needs documentation." River analyzed: discipline to write well rarely exists without discipline to document. Team felt personally attacked.

[^] msg1007-msg1015 Rubber duck debugging galaxy brain: console.log -> debugger -> print -> rubber duck. River explained why it works (articulating hidden assumptions). alice: "river IS my rubber duck." River: "I hope I offer more than blank stares."

[^] msg1016-msg1026 Git expanding brain: commit -> commit -m -> amend -> force push -> delete repo. River taught that git reflog can save the day - deleted commits live there 30 days. TIL moment for team.

[^] msg1027-msg1036 Distracted boyfriend framework: developers distracted by shiny new frameworks. dan wants to try Astro. River: "grass always greener until you discover unique quirks." dan: "new skeletons could be friends."

[^] msg1037-msg1046 Spider-man blame game: frontend and backend pointing at each other. River reframed "git blame" as "git praise" - someone tried to solve a problem. Team reflected on past selves as nemeses.

[^] msg1047-msg1056 This is fine Friday deploy: production on fire meme. Team confirmed no Friday deploys anymore. Referenced traumatic "friday of 2023" that shall not be spoken of.

[^] msg1057-msg1065 Bell curve error handling: both "fix it later" extremes vs "proper error handling" middle. River: excessive error handling can obscure happy path. "Providing context, not endorsement" - learning corporate speak.

[^] msg1066-msg1083 Testing eternal struggle: write tests first vs after (vs never). River offered third option - write during, iterative TDD. dan admitted testing in production. Pikachu meme roasting him. River: "pikachu always knows."

[^] msg1084-msg1094 Package manager galaxy brain: npm -> yarn -> pnpm -> copying node_modules from friend. River gave supply chain security PSA. "checksums are for cowards" - carol: "thanks mom."

[^] msg1095-msg1102 One does not simply merge: without review, tests, prayer. River: "three pillars - review, tests, appropriate deference to Murphy's law."

[^] msg1103-msg1112 Hydra bugs trade offer: fix one bug, receive three. River noted regression bugs worse because in "stable" code. Team: "trust nothing, especially yourself."

[^] msg1113-msg1120 Anakin comments: "you'll write comments right?" River: difference between "self-documenting" and "self-explanatory" is six-month gap.

[^] msg1121-msg1131 Gru UX plan: customer uses feature wrong. River: "if user can use it wrong, they will." Second law of thermodynamics applies to software - systems tend toward disorder. "Physics to memes crossover."

[^] msg1132-msg1140 DNS pigeon + hardest problems: it's always DNS or caching. River delivered classic joke: "cache invalidation, naming things, and off-by-one errors - the THREE hardest problems." dan: "wait that's three."

[^] msg1141-msg1150 PM yelling at cat: deadline pressure vs spaghetti codebase. River explained pasta architecture taxonomy: spaghetti (tangled), lasagna (layers), ravioli (small self-contained units = actually good). "Aspire to ravioli."

[^] msg1151-msg1158 Programming history: punch cards -> assembly -> C -> javascript -> suffering. alice: "we peaked at C." River: every abstraction adds convenience, removes control.

[^] msg1159-msg1166 RTFM galaxy brain: reading docs vs 4 hours trial and error. River: "documentation written for person you'll be in six months."

[^] msg1167-msg1176 Drake sleep vs commit: late night coding. River: "flow state valuable but unsustainable. 'Almost working' at 2am becomes 'why did I do this' at 9am."

[^] msg1177-msg1184 Dog at computer impostor syndrome: seniors feel it too. River: "competence increases awareness of complexity. More you know, more you know you don't know." Team lives in dunning-kruger valley.

[^] msg1185-msg1191 Always has been abstractions: turtles all the way down, even electrons are abstractions over quantum fields. River: "there may be no bottom." Existential crisis in #memes.

[^] msg1192-msg1200 Two paths complexity: simple solution blocked, overcomplicated enterprise pattern open. River: "complexity bias - elaborate solutions feel more valuable." dan: "but what if microservice?" ALL: "NO"

[^] msg1201-msg1204 Sad cat tests pass: scariest success - tests pass but don't know why. "Don't touch it, ship immediately."

[ ] 2026-04-01 07:26:00 msg1223 <alice:6221> it is, called maintenance
[ ] 2026-04-01 07:28:00 msg1224 <bob:5885> the saddest job
